Description
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.font
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.style
Provides classes used to manage Style.

  • Uses of UFontFace in net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.font

    Methods in net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.font that return UFontFace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static UFontFace
    UFontFace.bold()
    Returns the standard bold face (weight 700, non-italic).
    static UFontFace
    UFontFace.boldItalic()
    Returns the standard bold-italic face (weight 700, italic).
    static UFontFace
    UFontFace.fromCssWeight(String cssValue)
    Parses a CSS font-weight string.
    final UFontFace
    FontParam.getDefaultFontFace(ISkinParam skinParam, boolean inPackageTitle)
     
    UFontFace
    FontConfiguration.getFontFace()
    Returns the UFontFace (weight + italic axis) carried by the current font of this configuration.
    UFontFace
    UFont.getFontFace()
    Returns the font face (weight + italic axis) for this font.
    UFontFace
    UFontImpl.getFontFace()
     
    static UFontFace
    UFontFace.italic()
    Returns the standard italic face (weight 400, italic).
    static UFontFace
    UFontFace.normal()
    Returns the standard normal face (weight 400, non-italic).
    static UFontFace
    UFontFace.of(UFontStyle style, int cssWeight)
    Creates a face from a CSS numeric weight (100-900) and a style.
    static UFontFace
    UFontFace.of(UFontStyle style, UFontWeight weight)
    Creates a face from an explicit style and weight.
    UFontFace
    UFontFace.withStyle(UFontStyle newStyle)
    Returns a new face with the given style, keeping the current weight.
    UFontFace
    UFontFace.withWeight(int cssWeight)
    Returns a new face with the given CSS weight, keeping the current style.
    UFontFace
    UFontFace.withWeight(UFontWeight newWeight)
    Returns a new face with the given weight, keeping the current style.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static UFont
    UFontFactory.build(String fullDefinition, UFontFace face, int fontSize)
    Builds a font using a face (weight + italic axis) and size.
    Font
    FontStack.getFont(String text, UFontFace face, int size)
    Face-aware font creation.
    FontConfiguration
    FontConfiguration.withFontFace(UFontFace face)
    Returns a new FontConfiguration whose underlying font has been updated to reflect the supplied UFontFace (weight + italic axis).
    UFont
    UFont.withFontFace(UFontFace face)
    Returns a new font with the given face and the same size and family.
    UFont
    UFontImpl.withFontFace(UFontFace newFace)
